sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ الشُّكْرَ يَجْعَلُ الْعَلَاقَاتِ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Mislim da zahvalnost čini odnose boljim.
sentences.translationEn: I think that gratitude makes relationships better.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَشْكُرُ شَخْصًا عَلَى مَسَاعَدَتِهِ يَفْرَحُ وَيُسَاعِدُكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Kada zahvališ nekome na pomoći, on se raduje i ponovo ti pomaže.
sentences.translationEn: When you thank someone for their help they are happy and help you again.

sentences.arabic: أَقُولُ شُكْرًا كَثِيرًا لِلنَّاسِ مِنْ حَوْلِي.
sentences.translation: Često govorim hvala ljudima oko mene.
sentences.translationEn: I say thank you a lot to the people around me.

sentences.arabic: الشُّكْرُ كَلِمَةٌ صَغِيرَةٌ لَكِنَّ أَثَرَهَا كَبِيرٌ.
sentences.translation: Hvala je mala riječ ali njen utjecaj je veliki.
sentences.translationEn: Thank you is a small word but its effect is big.
